title: ANSI Color & VT-100 Test Suite
description: Demonstrates Serial Studio's comprehensive ANSI color and VT-100 terminal emulation support for 4-bit, 8-bit, and 24-bit RGB colors.

title: Serial Studio API Client
description: A Python client for the Serial Studio API with interactive REPL, CLI interface, and automated testing capabilities for controlling Serial Studio remotely.

title: BLE Battery Level Monitor
description: Visualizes battery level from BLE devices by connecting over Bluetooth Low Energy and subscribing to the standard Battery Service characteristic.

title: Camera Telemetry
description: Streams live camera video to Serial Studio over UDP alongside FPS and frame count telemetry using JPEG image autodetection.

title: CAN Bus ECU Simulator
description: Demonstrates CAN bus usage with a physics-based ECU simulator that sends realistic vehicle data and DBC file import for automatic dashboard generation.

title: Audio Pipeline Validator
description: Converts audio data recorded via Serial Studio's Audio I/O driver into playable WAV files for validating data pipeline integrity.

title: Dual Drone Telemetry
description: Multi-source drone telemetry simulator demonstrating simultaneous reception from two independent drones with distinct flight patterns and synthetic camera feeds.

title: Electromagnetic Wave Simulator
description: Simulates a propagating EM plane wave with orthogonal electric and magnetic field vectors as described by Maxwell's equations.

title: Command-Based ADC Sampling
description: Showcases binary data parsing, custom serial actions, timed execution, and CRC-16 checksum validation for Arduino-based sensor data acquisition with FFT analysis.

title: Hydrogen Atom: 1s Orbital
description: Simulates the electron probability distribution of a hydrogen atom's 1s orbital using Monte Carlo sampling streamed over UDP for 3D visualization.

title: IMU Batched Data Simulator
description: Demonstrates multi-frame parsing of batched sensor data, automatically expanding high-frequency IMU samples into individual frames for smooth visualization.

title: ISS Tracker
description: Visualizes real-time position and velocity of the International Space Station fetched from a public API and streamed over UDP with interactive map display.

title: Lorenz Attractor
description: Simulates and visualizes the Lorenz attractor, a chaotic system of differential equations, using an Arduino or Python UDP version for real-time plotting.

title: LTE Modem Signal Monitor
description: Demonstrates multiple methods (virtual serial port, MQTT, UDP) for receiving and visualizing signal quality data from an LTE modem.

title: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Client
description: Demonstrates how to use the Model Context Protocol with Serial Studio, enabling AI models like Claude to interact with telemetry data.

title: Modbus PLC Simulator
description: Physics-based hydraulic test stand simulator acting as a Modbus TCP server with realistic industrial telemetry data and failure mode simulation.

title: MPU6050 Accelerometer & Gyroscope
description: Visualizes motion and orientation data from an MPU6050 sensor connected to Arduino with real-time display on attitude indicators.

title: NI DAQmx Data Acquisition Bridge
description: High-performance Python bridge that streams real-time data from NI DAQ devices to Serial Studio in CSV format with support for voltage and current measurement.

title: Pulse Sensor (PPG) Monitor
description: Visualizes heart pulse data from a photoplethysmography sensor with low-pass and moving average filtering for real-time waveform display.

title: RC Plane Telemetry Simulator
description: Python script that simulates a complete RC plane flight profile with realistic telemetry data to validate and demonstrate Serial Studio widgets.

title: System Monitor
description: Turns Serial Studio into a live system dashboard using the Process I/O driver to monitor CPU, memory, disk, network, and per-core utilization.

title: TinyGPS Location Tracker
description: Visualizes GPS location data from a GY-NEO6MV2 GPS module connected to Arduino with real-time map display of latitude, longitude, and altitude.

title: UDP Function Generator
description: Generates and transmits multiple real-time waveforms (sine, triangle, sawtooth, square) over UDP for testing and visualizing signal behavior.
